---
system("git config --global user.name \"Burcu Altundag\"")
system("git config --global user.email \"mailadresin@example.com\"")---
title: "About Me."
sidebar: false 
---

![](images/f17b7a39-f8f1-4dc7-98d2-f7d9e1659687.jfif){fig-align="center" width="226"}

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Kırıkkale University, Turkey, 2009 - 2013.

-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2025 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  ASELSAN, Team Lead Engineer, 2025-Ongoing

2.  ASELSAN, Lead Engineer, 2022-2025

## Internships

1.  ASELSAN, Intern , year 2012

# Projects

1.  TUBİTAK 1001..........................

# Publications

1.  Dasdemir, E., Batta, R., Koksalan, M., Tezcaner Ozturk, D. (2022) “UAV Routing for Reconnaissance Mission: A Multi-Objective Orienteering Problem with Time-Dependent Prizes and Multiple Connections”, Computers & Operations Research, 145: 105882.

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies
